permission.title: Don't forget your habits
permission.description: Without notifications you'll miss daily reminders and your pet might miss you

banner.denied: Notifications are disabled. You can enable them in Settings

habits.title: Choose your first habits
habits.emptyState: No suggested habits for these areas.

absent: I'll be right here waiting, no matter what.
I know you'll come back when you're ready.
I'll keep your spot warm until you return.
My love for you isn't going anywhere.
Take all the time you need, friend.
sad: I miss you so much, you know? 🥺
I'm really hoping we can play today. 💔
Feeling a tiny bit lonely lately. 🌧️
Seeing you today would mean the world. 🌱
A hug from you would honestly make my day. 🫂
confused: What day is it? I totally lost track. 😵‍💫
I think I drifted off our schedule. 🐢
Our routine is a little topsy-turvy lately. 🎪
Should we do something or should I just nap? 🦦
I need a coffee, or just your attention. ☕
cheering: We're on the right track, I love this! ✨
You've got so much energy today, share it! ⚡
I love watching you shine every single day. 🌟
What a great rhythm we've got going! 🚀
You always make me so incredibly proud. 💛
happy: We're unstoppable! What an amazing moment. 🎉
I feel on top of the world with you. 🌍✨
Our best version is shining brighter than ever! 💎
Couldn't be happier to be by your side. 🌻
We make an absolutely top-tier team! 🏆
